description: The central galaxy is smooth, round, and undisturbed, with no visible interaction or merger signatures.
The central galaxy is a face-on featured disk with two tightly wound spiral arms, a strong bar, a small bulge, and no signs of disturbance.
The featured disk is viewed edge-on and has a rounded central bulge. A slight asymmetric extension indicates minor disturbance.
The central source is an imaging artifact rather than a galaxy.
